title: The Sleep-Body-Tinnitus Triangle
phrases: "The breath doesn't need your management. It needs your companionship."
"Most people don't fear change. They fear the gap between who they were and who they haven't become yet."
"You don't arrive at peace. You stop walking away from it."
interjections: And this is the part nobody talks about.
Let that land for a second.
researchers: Alan Watts (Eastern philosophy for Western minds)

title: How Fatigue Amplifies Tinnitus Through Neural Pathways

title: Cold Exposure and Its Effect on Tinnitus
